title: Opening for Software Engineer at Capital Float

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Capital Float
jsonLd.description:
Join the Capital Float family as a Software Engineer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Capital Float:
Capital Float is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float!
